privacy: The Kaggle account email was confirmed in the private task conversation and is intentionally not stored in the repository.

ucf_crime_kaggle_frames.access_method: Direct download using the owner's authenticated Kaggle account
ucf_crime_kaggle_frames.terms_basis: Owner-confirmed direct Kaggle acquisition; mirror metadata reports CC0, while third-party source-footage rights remain qualified.
ucf_crime_kaggle_frames.redistribution: Raw frames and source-video-identifying detailed inventories are not redistributed.

cuhk_avenue.access_method: Direct public download without login or account acceptance flow
cuhk_avenue.terms_basis: Official public download page plus the local accompanying code's non-commercial-use notice; no broader standalone redistribution license was found.
cuhk_avenue.redistribution: Raw videos, volumes, and masks are not redistributed.

decision: The project may use both local datasets internally for non-commercial academic research. Release remains aggregate/manifests-only subject to filename and source-footage review.
